title: put({}) succeeds but get returns DecodeFailed — broken round-trip
description:
Trigger: put(SecretValue::new(b"{}")), no ?field=, then get() on same path.

put without ?field= parses the value as serde_json::Map<String, serde_json::Value>. An empty JSON object {} parses successfully and vaultrs::kv2::set writes an empty data map to Vault.

get without ?field= then hits the is_empty() guard (line 208) and returns Err(DecodeFailed('vault secret has no fields…')). The caller called put successfully and cannot read back what they wrote.

Fix: add a non-empty check in put without ?field= before calling vaultrs::kv2::set, mirroring the is_empty() guard in get. Return DecodeFailed('put without ?field= requires a non-empty JSON object') for {}.
